title: Villager Professions and Job Blocks
quickAnswer: Each working villager profession is tied to one job block. Link an unemployed villager to the right workstation before trading if you want to reroll its offers.
keyFacts: Common pairings: librarian -> lectern, farmer -> composter, toolsmith -> smithing table, armorer -> blast furnace, cleric -> brewing stand.
Profession usually tells you the trade role: farmers buy crops, librarians sell books, clerics trade mob or nether materials, and smith villagers trade gear.
Only unemployed villagers can freely change profession after claiming a new workstation.
Nitwits do not take professions and cannot be used for normal trading setups.
commonMistakes: Trading once and then expecting the villager to keep changing profession.
Placing multiple nearby workstations and assuming the villager claimed the one you meant.
